title: Pouteria serpentina

intro: Pouteria serpentina, also known as the serpent tree or silky chestnut, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, characterized by its smooth, gray bark and elliptical leaves. The health benefits of Pouteria serpentina are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
